description: §41.16.6 — a struct field typed as a payload-bearing enum (one or more variants carry payload, e.g. `Result:enum = { Ok(value: string), Err(message: string) }`) with no explicit slot override fires E-TABLEFOR-VARIANT-PAYLOAD-ENUM-V1. `Job` has `{ id, status: Result }`; `status` has no slot. v1.0 has no default rendering for payload variants. (Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 + W-STDLIB-SEED-FAILCLOSED co-fire, as in the sibling table-for cases; superset match.)
rationale: §41.16.6 E-TABLEFOR-VARIANT-PAYLOAD-ENUM-V1: a payload-bearing enum field with no explicit `<column field="X">` slot override has no v1.0 default rendering (mirror schemaFor §41.15.6). Resolution: provide an explicit slot with adopter-authored payload rendering, OR refactor to a bare-variant enum, OR exclude via `omit=["status"]`.
